chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-5926 OF 2019 Muhammad Siddiqui Palijo & others Versus Province of Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge For orders as to maintainability of petition. Dated: 05.05.2025 Mr. S. Muhammad Saulat Rizvi for petitioners. -.-.- Learned counsel for the petitioners, on instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. Head of Const. Benches Judge
